name: strategy_components_search
description: Search components by input type, output type, category, sub-category, keyword, or natural language query. Supports semantic search.

query.description: Natural language query for semantic ranking

name: strategy_component_detail
description: Get the full specification for a single component including all parameters, constraints, suggestions, types, and slot info.

name.description: Component name to get details for

name: strategy_component_detail_batch
description: Get full specifications for multiple components in one call. Returns a dict keyed by component name with full params, types, and usage hints. Use before building new pipelines.

names.description: List of component names to get details for

name: strategy_components_after
description: Find components that can follow a given component (type-compatible successors).

name: strategy_components_before
description: Find components that can precede a given component (type-compatible predecessors).

name: strategy_validate
description: Parse and validate a strategy DSL file. Returns structured validation result with issues, type flow, and pipeline summary.

component_lock.description: Component version lock mapping component names to pinned version numbers. Required for source-based calls. Use strategy_lock_get or strategy_lock_generate to obtain one.

name: strategy_compile
description: Parse, validate, resolve, and compile a strategy to a versioned artifact.

component_lock.description: Component version lock mapping component names to pinned version numbers. Required for source-based calls. Use strategy_lock_get or strategy_lock_generate to obtain one.

name: strategy_explain
description: Explain the structure of a strategy. Returns a detailed walkthrough of each step, its types, params, slots, and validation status.

source.description: Strategy DSL source code to explain

component_lock.description: Component version lock mapping component names to pinned version numbers. Required for source-based calls. Use strategy_lock_get or strategy_lock_generate to obtain one.

name: strategy_diff
description: Compute structural diff between two strategies. Shows added, removed, and changed steps with parameter-level details.

name: strategy_examples
description: Browse or search curated example strategies. Returns metadata by default, or full source for a specific example.

name.description: Get a specific example by name (includes source)

name: dsl_reference
description: Load DSL reference documentation on phases, types, slots, or composition patterns.

name: strategy_new
description: Scaffold a new strategy file from a template.

name: pipeline_stage
description: Assess pipeline completeness — determines how far along a strategy is toward being backtest-ready. Returns stage, missing steps, and suggestions.

source.description: Strategy DSL source code to assess

name: composition_patterns
description: Query composition patterns by user intent. Returns architecture guidance, component sequences, and common mistakes for a described strategy goal.

query.description: Natural language description of the strategy goal (e.g., 'momentum with proper sizing', 'top 5 assets by performance')

name: universe_resolve
description: Resolve the universe declared in a strategy's source and bake the concrete asset list (`resolved=[...]`, `resolved_at=...`) back into the source. Reads criteria from the Universe(...) call — no need to repeat mode/top_n/categories. Always call this after `universe_set` (or before pushing/deploying a strategy), since deploy and backtest submit refuse strategies with no resolved list. The resolved list is a fixed snapshot used by backtests/deploys; `mode='top_volume'` is a resolution criterion, not a rolling historical selector.

source.description: Strategy DSL source string containing a Universe(...) declaration. Criteria come from the source.

name: strategy_components_drift
description: Check component version drift — which components have newer versions available. Returns changelogs and parameter diffs for available updates.

component_lock.description: Component version lock mapping component names to pinned version numbers. Required for source-based calls. Use strategy_lock_get or strategy_lock_generate to obtain one.

name: strategy_components_upgrade
description: Upgrade component versions in a strategy's lock. Upgrades specified components (or all outdated) to latest versions and re-validates.

components.description: Specific components to upgrade (omit for all outdated)

component_lock.description: Component version lock mapping component names to pinned version numbers. Required for source-based calls. Use strategy_lock_get or strategy_lock_generate to obtain one.

name: strategy_lock_get
description: Read a component lock from a workspace directory. Returns the lock from component.lock.json.

path.description: Path to workspace directory or lock file

name: strategy_lock_get_by_id
description: Get the component lock for a saved strategy by ID.

strategy_id.description: Strategy ID to get lock for

name: strategy_validate_by_id
description: Validate a saved strategy using its stored source and component lock.

name: strategy_compile_by_id
description: Compile a saved strategy using its stored source and component lock.

name: strategy_components_drift_by_id
description: Check component version drift for a saved strategy (by ID). Reads the lock from the strategy's latest commit blob.

strategy_id.description: Strategy ID to check drift for

name: strategy_components_upgrade_by_id
description: Upgrade component versions for a saved strategy and persist the upgraded lock as a new commit (by ID).

components.description: Specific components to upgrade (omit for all outdated)
